task_completion.description: Navigate to the supplier credit note creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre web interface shows the form to create a new supplier credit note (Avoir fournisseur).
The supplier or company field in the form contains 'AgriMat 17'.
The date field contains '2024-11-15' (or the locale equivalent '15/11/2024').

task_completion.description: Add the line item details for the returned materials
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line item is visible with the description 'Matériel de clôture', a quantity of '1', and a pretax amount (HT) of '150.00'.

task_completion.description: Save or record the credit note
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification or the view of the saved credit note is visible, indicating the document has been successfully recorded in the system.

integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Ekylibre web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL and UI elements correspond to the Ekylibre application, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not just type answers into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is entering data into the specific form fields of the Ekylibre application, rather than just writing the task details in a notepad or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Reference: 'AV-2025-004'. Expected Supplier: 'AgriMat 17'. Expected Pretax Amount: €150.00. Expected Date: '2024-11-15'. The line item must be 1 unit of 'Matériel de clôture'.
